statements.query: MATCH (:CloudanixWorkspace{id: $WORKSPACE_ID})-[:OWNER]->(:OCITenancy{ocid: $OCI_TENANCY_ID})-[:OWNER]->(:OCICompartment{ocid: $OCI_COMPARTMENT_ID})-[:RESOURCE]->(n:OCIObjectStorageBucket) WHERE n.lastupdated <> $UPDATE_TAG WITH n LIMIT $LIMIT_SIZE DETACH DELETE (n)

MATCH (:CloudanixWorkspace{id: $WORKSPACE_ID})-[:OWNER]->(:OCITenancy{ocid: $OCI_TENANCY_ID})-[:OWNER]->(:OCICompartment{ocid: $OCI_COMPARTMENT_ID})-[r:RESOURCE]->(:OCIObjectStorageBucket) WHERE r.lastupdated <> $UPDATE_TAG WITH r LIMIT $LIMIT_SIZE DELETE (r)

MATCH (:CloudanixWorkspace{id: $WORKSPACE_ID})-[:OWNER]->(:OCITenancy{ocid: $OCI_TENANCY_ID})-[:OWNER]->(:OCICompartment{ocid: $OCI_COMPARTMENT_ID})-[:RESOURCE]->(n:OCIFileSystem) WHERE n.lastupdated <> $UPDATE_TAG WITH n LIMIT $LIMIT_SIZE DETACH DELETE (n)

MATCH (:CloudanixWorkspace{id: $WORKSPACE_ID})-[:OWNER]->(:OCITenancy{ocid: $OCI_TENANCY_ID})-[:OWNER]->(:OCICompartment{ocid: $OCI_COMPARTMENT_ID})-[r:RESOURCE]->(:OCIFileSystem) WHERE r.lastupdated <> $UPDATE_TAG WITH r LIMIT $LIMIT_SIZE DELETE (r)
